channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Massachusetts lawmakers push for an effort to ban all tobacco sales over time
item.description: A handful of Massachusetts lawmakers are hoping to persuade their colleagues to support a proposal that would make the state the first to adopt a ban meant to eliminate the use of tobacco products over time.
item.dc:creator: Steve Leblanc, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Donald Trump's call for 'energy dominance' is likely to run into real-world limits
item.description: Donald Trump is creating a National Energy Council that he says will establish U.S. “energy dominance” around the world.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Daly, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: China releases 3 Americans it imprisoned for years, and Beijing says US returned 4 people to China
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Three American citizens imprisoned for years by China arrived back in the United States late Wednesday. Their release, announced earlier by the White House, was the result of a rare diplomatic agreement with Beijing in the final months of the Biden administration.
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER, AAMER MADHANI and MATTHEW LEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The outlook is uncertain for AI regulations as the US government pivots to full Republican control
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — With artificial intelligence at a pivotal moment of development, the federal government is about to transition from one that prioritized AI safeguards to one more focused on eliminating red tape.
item.dc:creator: DAN MERICA and ALI SWENSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dementia research and support to continue in Minnesota after Congress passes legislation
item.description: U.S. Senator Amy Klobuchar spoke at a senior living facility in Minneapolis about legislation that was passed last week reauthorizing a 2018 act that provides research, education and support for those facing Alzheimer’s and dementia and their caregivers.
item.dc:creator: Anika Besst, MPR News

item.title: Zuckerberg dines with Trump in Mar-a-Lago
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — Donald Trump dined on Wednesday with Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg at the president-elect’s Mar-a-Lago club in Florida, bringing together the Facebook founder and the former president who was once banned from that social network.
item.dc:creator: ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Americans' opinion of Republican Party on the rise
item.description: In the poll, 45 percent of Americans said they feel “favorable” toward the Republican Party, up 6 points from an Economist/YouGov poll in late October, when 39 percent said they felt favorable toward GOP.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, NewsNation

item.title: No Labels pushes back after opposition to third-party run
item.description: No Labels, a centrist group, claims in court documents that some Democrats worked to oppose a third-party candidate
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: Trump turns to outsider to shake up Navy, but his lack of military experience raises concerns
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump's nominee to be secretary of the Navy, John Phelan, has not served in the military or had a civilian leadership role in the service.
item.dc:creator: TARA COPP, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: DeWine signs bill restricting bathroom access for transgender Ohio students
item.description: Transgender students may use single-occupancy or faculty facilities with “controlled use,” according to the bill, Senate Bill 104.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, NewsNation

item.title: 4 takeaways from Trump's health agency nominations
item.description: Almost all have been highly critical of the agencies they would run if confirmed, and experts say the nominees represent a complete overhaul of the vision and priorities of key agencies for health care and public health.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Weixel, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: End of Trump prosecutions renews scrutiny of DOJ's pace
item.description: Special counsel Jack Smith's move to dismiss Donald Trump's two federal indictments has sparked finger-pointing from those eager to see the president-elect held to account, with critics airing their frustrations at the Department of Justice (DOJ) and the courts for the anticlimactic end to the case.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump taps Kevin Hassett as National Economic Council head
item.description: President-elect Trump has chosen former White House economic adviser Kevin Hassett to lead the National Economic Council in his next administration, he said Tuesday. “I am very pleased to announce that Dr. Kevin A.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, NewsNation

item.title: Trump turns to critic of COVID mandates to run NIH
item.description: Dr. Jay Bhattacharya, a Stanford health researcher, is in line to lead the National Institutes of Health. Early in the pandemic he argued against lockdowns and focusing on people at highest risk.
item.dc:creator: Rob Stein, MPR News

item.title: Minnesota Republicans to challenge election result in Shakopee House race in court
item.description: After a recount upheld a DFL candidate’s narrow win, the outcome moves next to the courts for a race that would determine whether the Minnesota House is in GOP hands or tied next year.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, MPR News

item.title: Trump's tariffs may be targeted at others — but they could impact you too
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump threatened to slap hefty tariffs on China, Canada and Mexico. Those tariffs would hurt America too — if they are carried out.
item.dc:creator: Scott Horsley, MPR News

item.title: Trump's favorability climbs in post-election poll
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump’s favorability climbed by six points after he was elected president earlier this month, a new poll on Tuesday found.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5

item.title: Walmart becomes latest — and biggest — company to roll back its DEI policies
item.description: Conservative groups have filed lawsuits against workplace diversity initiatives that prioritize historically marginalized groups.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News
